$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Number Indicator component
$description: A pill-shaped counter showing current slide position as 'N/Total' (e.g. '1/9'). Three colour themes: Primary (filled blue), Secondary (white with blue border and text), Tertiary (white with gray border). All themes share the same container shape, padding, shadow, and typography — only background, border colour, and text colour differ.

border-width.description: Uniform border on all themes- default - 1px

horizontal.description: Left and right inset inside the pill- 2xs - 10px

vertical.description: Top and bottom inset inside the pill- 4xs - 4px

shadow.description: Subtle elevation — two-layer drop shadow (0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) + 0px 1px 3px rgba(16,24,40,0.10))

primary.description: Filled blue pill — highest visual prominence, used on dark or image backgrounds

border-color.description: Subtle gray border matches the lighter surround rather than the fill- gray/200 - #eaecf0

text-color.description: White numeral text on the blue background- gray/0 - #ffffff

secondary.description: White pill with blue border and blue text — medium prominence

text-color.description: Primary blue numeral matching the border- blue/700 - #004eeb

tertiary.description: White pill with gray border and gray text — lowest prominence, for use on light backgrounds
